Step 1

Onboarding

$1,000 per school  ·  One-Time

Before any ads go live, we complete a structured onboarding for each school. This is where we do the foundational work that determines whether campaigns succeed or fail — account structure, tracking, strategy, and a deep understanding of each school's students and families.

01
Ad Account Audit & Setup

Full review of existing Google and Meta accounts. We identify what is working, fix what is not, and build the right structure from the start. If accounts don't exist yet, we build them.

02
Audience & Messaging Workshop

A 30–40 minute session with each school team to understand student personas, family demographics, and your unique value proposition. This informs every piece of creative and targeting.

03
Conversion Tracking & Analytics

Installation of Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel, and conversion events so every dollar of ad spend is tied to a measurable action. Without this, it is impossible to know what is working.

04
Campaign Strategy & Launch Plan

A written brief covering platform selection, audience targeting, budget allocation, and a 90-day roadmap aligned to enrollment goals and your seasonal calendar.

Onboarding typically takes 1–2 weeks. Ad campaigns do not launch until onboarding is complete.

Step 2

Monthly Retainer

Choose the package that fits where each school is right now. Option 1 covers full active management and strategy. Option 2 adds creative production, Google Business Profile, and conversion rate optimization. Option 3 adds full website management — content edits, new page development, and ongoing site maintenance — for schools that want one partner handling everything.

Option 1
$500
per school / per month
  • ✓ Full Google Ads & Meta campaign management
  • ✓ Ad copywriting & A/B testing
  • ✓ Weekly 30-min strategy meeting
  • ✓ Monthly CPL & enrollment reporting
  • – Ad creative design
  • – Google Business Profile
  • – Conversion rate optimization
  • – Website management
Option 2
$1,000
per school / per month
  • ✓ Full Google Ads & Meta campaign management
  • ✓ Ad copywriting & A/B testing
  • ✓ Weekly 30-min strategy meeting
  • ✓ Monthly CPL & enrollment reporting
  • ✓ Ad creative — graphics, banners & refreshes
  • ✓ Google Business Profile management
  • ✓ Conversion rate optimization (CRO)
  • – Website management
Add-On Package
Option 3
+$1,500
per school / per month
  • ✓ Website content edits — copy, images, events, and announcements updated on request
  • ✓ New page development — program pages, enrollment pages, and campaign landing pages
  • ✓ On-page SEO optimization — titles, meta descriptions, headers, and internal linking
  • ✓ Blog publishing — format, optimize, and publish school content
  • ✓ Mobile and performance checks — ensure pages load fast and display correctly
  • ✓ Inquiry form and CTA audits — keep conversion points sharp and functional
Note on Ad Spend: Media spend paid directly to Google and Meta is billed separately and not included in any retainer option. You maintain full control and visibility over every dollar. Playbook does not mark up ad spend. Option 3 (Website Management) can be added on top of Option 1 or Option 2.
Investment & Projected Results

Projected Results by School

Based on 2025 private K–12 digital advertising benchmarks, adjusted for each school's market and audience. Assumes Option 2 with properly configured campaigns. Months 1–2 will be lower as campaigns optimize; months 3+ reflect steady-state performance.

School Rec. Ad Spend/mo Est. Leads/mo Est. Students/yr Est. Cost/Student Notes
BIS-NYManhattan, NY $3,000–$4,000 25–40 24–48 $875–$2,000 Niche expat market. Higher CPL due to Manhattan competition. Low volume, very high LTV.
TessaHoboken, NJ $2,000–$3,000 35–55 36–72 $333–$1,000 Fastest ROI. Strong existing infrastructure. Multi-language campaigns drive high lead volume.
Lady BirdBuda, TX $1,500–$2,500 40–65 40–80 $225–$750 Best value per lead. Booming Austin market. Montessori is a high-intent search category.
Shu RenBerkeley, CA $1,000–$1,500 12–20 12–24 $500–$1,500 Niche Mandarin immersion. Costs improve once account infrastructure is rebuilt.

Terms

Simple & Straightforward

  • Onboarding fee is due upon proposal acceptance, prior to work commencing.
  • Monthly retainer is billed on the 1st of each month.
  • A minimum 3-month commitment is required for all new monthly retainers.
  • Ad spend is billed directly to each school's Google and Meta accounts — Playbook does not mark up ad spend.
  • Either party may cancel with 30 days written notice after the initial 3-month period.
